preamble: The voiced palato-alveolar fricative [ʒ] merges into the voiced retroflex fricative [ʐ] in the phonetic evolution of the Mandarin sound system.

examples.note: Historical shift of voiced palatal fricatives towards retroflexion.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
